steps.text: You should be level 51 (or higher) slayer. Make sure you have finished the Curse of the Empty Lord miniquest (if you haven’t, do it now, putting the lamp on slayer). Teleport to Varrock, make sure to grab the Dragon’hai history book from the Varrock Palace library if you don’t already have it, pray at the altar in the palace with smite active. Buy 20,000 air runes (if you already have these you can ignore this), then run through the east gate to the quetzal to go to Varlamore and do At First Light (note: the hunter rumours are currently not efficient, but if you want the rewards you can go for them at any time after this quest). During At First Light catch a Sunlight antelope (east end of the island, requires level 72 hunter, a teasing stick, knife and logs - grab a Trapper’s tipple or two at the hunter’s guild for a +2 boost if needed) and kill a jaguar for their fur. At the hunter’s guild buy two mixed hide bases, and either pay Pellem to have the furs made into mixed hide boots (your best ranged boots for now) and a mixed hide cape (your best melee cape for now) or boost your crafting level if you have a spare mushroom pie to do it yourself. After this start and complete Perilous Moons (for the fights your dragon scimitar is fine, even for ice. Use the moss lizards and moonlight potions for supplies) and The Heart of Darkness. At the end of the quest travel to Tal Teklan (e.g. with the quetzal system). Buy four willow longbows at Arcuani’s Archery Supplies. If you haven’t done Scrambled! yet, do it now. Travel to Auburnvale (e.g. using the boat system). Start and complete Shadows of Custodia. Teleport out. Slay a Brine rat to complete the Fremennik medium diary, putting the lamp on herblore. Grab a rope, salve teleport, dip your enchanted silvthrill rod in the well to make the Rod of Ivandis and complete In Aid of the Myreque, Darkness of Hallowvale, A Taste of Hope and Sins of the Father (all lamps on herblore). Use the Efaritay’s aid during the Vanstrom Klause fight in Sins of the Father - you should only need one ring, the second is spare in case you die or run out of charges. - We will continue lamping slayer to level 58 for access to Cave Horrors (mind the quest xp still coming up, about 30k total from here), and after that put all lamps on herblore instead. You may choose to lamp more/less slayer depending on personal preference. There is more than enough lamp xp. - This unlocks Yarnio’s Baked Goods shop, a slightly better shop location for Garden pies than Romily Weaklax. - You can now complete the Varrock hard diary, if you haven’t before already., Teleport to Varrock and speak with the information clerk for xp, historian Minas for the Curse of the Empty Lord xp lamp and Orlando Smith for the diary. Put the lamps on slayer or herblore as mentioned previously.
steps.itemsNeeded: law runes, soul runes, silvthrill rod, rope, dramen staff, plank, 8 nails, hammer

actions.text: You should be level 51 (or higher) slayer.
Make sure you have finished the Curse of the Empty Lord miniquest (if you haven’t, do it now, putting the lamp on slayer).
Teleport to Varrock, make sure to grab the Dragon’hai history book from the Varrock Palace library if you don’t already have it, pray at the altar in the palace with smite active.

Buy 20,000 air runes (if you already have these you can ignore this), then run through the east gate to the quetzal to go to Varlamore and do At First Light (note: the hunter rumours are currently not efficient, but if you want the rewards you can go for them at any time after this quest).
During At First Light catch a Sunlight antelope (east end of the island, requires level 72 hunter, a teasing stick, knife and logs.
grab a Trapper’s tipple or two at the hunter’s guild for a +2 boost if needed) and kill a jaguar for their fur.

At the hunter’s guild buy two mixed hide bases, and either pay Pellem to have the furs made into mixed hide boots (your best ranged boots for now) and a mixed hide cape (your best melee cape for now) or boost your crafting level if you have a spare mushroom pie to do it yourself.
After this start and complete Perilous Moons (for the fights your dragon scimitar is fine, even for ice.
Use the moss lizards and moonlight potions for supplies) and The Heart of Darkness.
At the end of the quest travel to Tal Teklan (e.g.
with the quetzal system).
Buy four willow longbows at Arcuani’s Archery Supplies.
Talk to Alan in Tal Teok Temple, north of Tal Teklan, to start the quest.
Inspect the egg in front of you.
Head south into Tal Teklan and talk to King in the pub.
Get an empty bowl from the pub, will need it later. If it's not there, hop worlds or
Talk to Acatzin inside the Tal Teklan pub.
Talk to the Blacksmith west of the Tal Teklan pub.
Get the hammer from the table. If it's not there, hop worlds or wait for it
Get some nails from the blacksmith's workbench, we'll need them later.
Get the Saw from the house to the south, we'll need it later. If it's not there,
Fix the whetstone.
Talk to the Blacksmith again after fixing the whetstone to receive a damaged axe.
Repair the axe on the whetstone.
Return the repaired axe to Acatzin in the Tel Teklan pub.
Talk to Kauayotl at the east entrance of Tal Teklan.
Talk to Kauayotl again after repairing his cart.
Repair Kauayotl's cart.
Go south-west of Kauayotl and pick up two planks from besides the lake. If it's not
Teklan for some damiana leaves, we'll need these later.
Talk to Nezketi in the Tal Teklan temple.
Fill your empty bowl with water at the water pump near the eastern entrance of Tal Teklan.
Mix damiana leaves with your bowl of water.
Use your bowl of damiana water on the stove in the east part of Tal Teklan to boil it.
Return to Nezketi in the Tal Teklan temple and give him the cup of damiana tea.
Return to the temple north of Tal Teklan and speak with one of King's men.
Search the Eggs to get a Large egg.
Kill the large chicken.
Step across the log balance towards the dragon cave.
Search the Eggs in the dragon cave.
south-east of the dragon cave to collect your Dragon egg.
Exit the dragon's cave.
Search the Eggs at the camp, east of the dragon age, and collect your Jaguar egg.
Return to the temple north of Tal Teklan with the egg replacements and speak with one of \"King\"'s men.
Give Kauayotl the Dragon egg.
Give Nezketi the Jaguar egg.
Give Acatzin the Large egg.
Give the eggs to King's men at the Tal Teok Temple, north of Tal Teklan.
Return to the large temple north of Tal Teklan and talk with one of King's men to evaluate the Humphrey Dumphrey alternatives.
Talk to one of King's men to figure out how to solve the broken-egg conundrum.
Inspect the egg.
Put Lumpty Mumpty back together again.
Talk to one of King's men to finish the quest.
yet, do it now.
Travel to Auburnvale (e.g.
using the boat system).
Start and complete Shadows of Custodia.
Teleport out.
Slay a Brine rat to complete the Fremennik medium diary, putting the lamp on herblore.

Grab a rope, salve teleport, dip your enchanted silvthrill rod in the well to make the Rod of Ivandis and complete In Aid of the Myreque, Darkness of Hallowvale, A Taste of Hope and Sins of the Father (all lamps on herblore).
Use the Efaritay’s aid during the Vanstrom Klause fight in Sins of the Father.
you should only need one ring, the second is spare in case you die or run out of charges..
We will continue lamping slayer to level 58 for access to Cave Horrors (mind the quest xp still coming up, about 30k total from here), and after that put all lamps on herblore instead.
You may choose to lamp more/less slayer depending on personal preference.
There is more than enough lamp xp..
This unlocks Yarnio’s Baked Goods shop, a slightly better shop location for Garden pies than Romily Weaklax..

You can now complete the Varrock hard diary, if you haven’t before already., Teleport to Varrock and speak with the information clerk for xp, historian Minas for the Curse of the Empty Lord xp lamp and Orlando Smith for the diary.
Put the lamps on slayer or herblore as mentioned previously.

steps.text: Explorer’s ring teleport and run to Port Sarim to recruit Jobless Jim. Charter to the Pandemonium. Take your skiff to the starting point of Troubled Tortugans and start and complete the quest in full. While on the Great Conch collect the spyglass and strange apple tree charter on the isle. Next do port courier tasks to Summer Shore until level 50 sailing (Sailing training - OSRS Wiki), completing the charting of the Unquiet Ocean in the process (the Sea of Shells after level 47). You can collect the ocean completion xp bonus (6k xp) to get to level 50. You can set Jim to man the ship and trim the sails, reducing the xp from trimming by 50% but allowing you to multiskill (e.g. fletching headless arrows or alching) while sailing. Once you hit level 50 (optional: keep going to level 51/52/53 instead, to reduce or eliminate the need for boosting while salvaging), use a dueling ring and run south all the way to the desert mining camp, then run out and recruit Ex-Captain Siad (don’t forget the key to the camp). Next, book of the dead teleport to Piscarillius (or charter if you were at Pandemonium for the xp bonus), recover your skiff here and sail south to Chinchompa Island. Chart the charred remains of a table and open the lockbox to get (and read) the salvaging station schematic. Sail to Port Roberts and dock there. - When at the Onyx Crest, dock there and dig to find the small key for the Lost schematics - OSRS Wiki and kill pirates to get a medallion fragment. - Coral farming starts here. This is a worthwhile activity, creating super hunter potions and/or armadyl brews for herblore xp. From here on include coral in your farm runs, but only with attas active and 99 farming! Paying for protection is allegedly not worth it. You can visit the location by chartering to The Summer Shore, then taking the small boat to the northeast side of the island, then diving down. The first time you are down there search the coral on the west side to find a medallion fragment.
steps.itemsNeeded: yes

actions.text: Explorer’s ring teleport and run to Port Sarim to recruit Jobless Jim.
Get back to the Pandemonium. You can travel with Captain Tobias on Port Sarim dock for 30gp.
Talk to Will or Anne on the docks of Port Sarim to start the quest.
Talk to Will or Anne on the docks to board the ship.
Listen to the job explanation.
Navigate using the helm.
Raise your sails.
Sail south to the wreck north of the Pandemonium!
Learn about the other part of your job.
Deploy the Salvaging Hook.
Watch the salvaging cutscene.
Talk to 'Squawking' Steve Beanie behind the bar to learn about where you are.
Talk to 'Squawking' Steve Beanie about Will and Anne.
Talk to Ribs near the door to learn about the map.
Ask 'Squawking' Steve Beanie behind the bar about Will and Anne's location.
Ask Junior Jim by the docks about getting a ship.
Hand over the cup to Junior Jim and receive your mighty vessel!
Talk to Junior Jim to enter the shipyard.
Pick up a hammer from the crate of hammers.
Pick up a saw from the crate of saws.
Board your vessel.
Build the Cargo Hold.
Disembark your vessel.
Leave the shipyard using the portal.
Talk to Junior Jim to get a log book.
Talk to Junior Jim for a new job.
Let go of the helm.
Leave your ship.
Pick up the cargo from the ledger table on the docks.
Deposit the crate into your cargo hold.
Pick up the cargo from your ship's cargo hold.
Deliver the cargo at the ledger table on the docks.
Tell Junior Jim about your delivery.
Meet 'Squawking' Steve Beanie and Old Grog at the bar.
Talk to 'Squawking' Steve Beanie to finish the quest.

steps.text: Buy 62 lead ore. Steal from the silver stall to get a medallion fragment. Buy a sloop and build two kegs (fill one with whirlpool surprise and one with kraken ink stout), a salvaging station and two mithril salvaging hooks. Assign your two crewmembers to your boat. Sail your sloop to the large shipwrecks far south - do not go out of your way for charting with your slow sloop - north of the Isle of Serpents. Bring four empty beer glasses, a log basket and seed box (if you have them), and optionally methods to 1.5t the salvaging. Salvage until level 55 sailing, boosting sailing where necessary (it’s technically good to boost even if you have level 53 already). Your goal is to collect several hemp and cotton seeds for farming. Plant the hemp at your earliest convenience, making sure to have Attas up and using ultracompost to harvest at least 40 hemp in total.
steps.itemsNeeded: yes

actions.text: Buy 62 lead ore.
Steal from the silver stall to get a medallion fragment.
Buy a sloop and build two kegs (fill one with whirlpool surprise and one with kraken ink stout), a salvaging station and two mithril salvaging hooks.
Assign your two crewmembers to your boat.
Sail your sloop to the large shipwrecks far south.
do not go out of your way for charting with your slow sloop.
north of the Isle of Serpents.
Bring four empty beer glasses, a log basket and seed box (if you have them), and optionally methods to 1.5t the salvaging.
Salvage until level 55 sailing, boosting sailing where necessary (it’s technically good to boost even if you have level 53 already).
Your goal is to collect several hemp and cotton seeds for farming.
Plant the hemp at your earliest convenience, making sure to have Attas up and using ultracompost to harvest at least 40 hemp in total.

steps.text: Catch ~1.5k grey chins for level 55 ranging (at Soul Wars - you can take an axe to chop the nearby teaks in case you mess up your knife-log). Catch ~1.5k red chins between Kastori and Tal Teklan (TalTeklanChinSpot.png). Follow this guide for catching chins: OSRS Easy 1t Hunter Guide (In-Depth) for the methods (regardless of location and chin type). Train your ranging in the MM1 tunnels (short fuse) to level 62 (55 with grey, 55-62 with red). Make sure to equip a salve amulet (ei). - Optional alternative: skip this step and AFK the range training at crabs, you can even go to 70 but it is not really worth going beyond that. - Second optional alternative: after getting 50 ranging with either method, do A Night at the Theatre to lamp Ranging four times (80k xp total), then use either method to train to level 62 after. You will probably need someone to carry you for A Night at the Theatre, but this is going to be true even if you go at some later point. - If you have the herblore level to make ranged pots go and teleport one inventory of zamorak wines and make them all into potions, repotting frequently while chinning. - Buy an upgraded device from Ava at level 50 (worth leaving for). - At level 60 you can equip your mixed hide boots. - Osrs 1 Def Pure Chinning guide and Experience rates and OSRS Pure Chinning Guide (Maximizing XP rates) show the mm1 tunnel method, though it is better to use a spot one curve deeper into the cave. The best location is shown (poorly) in this image. - Optional: go do the Fight Caves for a fire cape. It will take quite a long time to get one, so we recommend getting one on step 27 of Chapter 3 instead. But if you feel confident and want one soon, this is the best moment.
steps.itemsNeeded: yes

You will probably need someone to carry you for A Night at the Theatre, but this is going to be true even if you go at some later point..

steps.text: Read this step in its entirety carefully. This step contains the Hallowed Sepulchre grind to level 82 agility. - You will be doing floor 3 runs until 82 agility. Along the way you want to loot certain coffins for hallowed marks and generic loot. It is optional but recommended to continue all the way to 98 agility instead. The following coffins are recommended: - On floor 3, loot the enchantment obstacle (only on the ONE side, 20240224_F3_Enchant_West.png, so on 50% of all runs). With a Hallowed focus (costs 100 hallowed marks) you will never fail the enchant and it will default to the lowest level enchantment spell you have on you. Without one the fail rate depends on the level of the spell and it will default to the highest one you have on you. It is recommended to use lvl-5 enchant before you have the focus, and lvl-3 enchant after. The XP gained for each spell is the same, regardless of level. - On floor 3 each side has a grapple (20240224_F3_Grapple_West.png, 20240224_F3_Grapple_East.png). You may choose to loot these right from the start, but failing them loses a lot of time. If you collect the Hallowed grapple (costs 100 hallowed marks) it is optional but not recommended to loot these until level 82 to speed up getting other loot. - Floors 1-2 are not worth looting, although if you are chasing collection log slots you have to loot these too. 20240224_F2_Grapple_West.pngfor floor 2 and see below for floor 1. - If you are using mahogany planks with rune nails (in BRUHsailer you will not be doing this) to build bridges it is efficient construction xp to build the bridge in floor 1 (on two out of four sides, so on 50% of all runs, 20240224_F1_Bridge_Coffin_West.png) but not to cross it. Alternatively this is required if you are hunting the collection log slots. - Based on the above, the recommended order for purchasing the Hallowed items is Focus > Instances > Ring > Hammer > Grapple. If you have banked vampyre ashes it is worth buying the Hallowed symbol and using them on floor 4 only. It is not efficient to collect vampyre ashes. You may always buy a few Hallowed tokens in case of a terrible run, so that you may finish it in time (and buy new tokens after). - You will be doing Fletchpalchre (fletching headless arrows and casting high alchemy while moving at sepulchre). Feel free to bring the herb sack and plank sack. Maintain hourlies. It is also possible to blow glass inside the sepulchre, this is even more efficient than other multiskilling options. Most of the time is spent alching, not fletching. - Once you have a little bit of cash restart misc to get teak logs for planks for building bridges (2400 total, 8 days). 10 teak 5 herb(/other) at Misc, along with 10 mahog 5 herb(/other) for future bird runs if you run low/out. Keep in mind that changing the Miscellania allocation works retroactively. - Keep misc running even if you have enough planks for Sepulchre. Once you have enough planks, swap to 10 mahogany 5 herb(/other) for future construction training. As your cash stack grows just dump 7.5m in there (we will assume this going forward). - You will only need these teak planks by the time you hit 82 agility, not before then. - The recommended way to make planks is the Aubunvale sawmill, running between bank and sawmill using a log basket and a plank sack to make two inventories at a time. This consumes (super) energy potions or stamina potions. Alternatively, you can use the PVP world POH butler method. - After Misc is up and running, buy arrow shafts(/cut them from maples) and buy feathers (in smaller chunks) to get to a total of 1 million headless arrows through fletchpalchre. - Alch (all) rune bolts for good magic xp along the way. - We recommend buying the initial helpful items first and then spending all further hallowed marks on hallowed crystal shards (the teleports) or saving them in case of a buff/change to the shop. - If you want a change of pace you can afk mine daeyalt essence for runecrafting later. There is also a high effort daeyalt (“dae-alch”) method: https://streamable.com/it7kry. - You can do this grind in smaller parts, or quit entirely at a lower agility level. Example setup here.
steps.itemsNeeded: green/blue d’hides, box traps, knife, teak log, salve amulet(ei), whatever other ranged gear you can scrounge up, crossbow, Sara items, hammer, fire staff, nature runes, a lot of money (obtained during the step, spent during the step).

steps.text: Do Blast Mining https://streamable.com/l3ylry to get to 330 addy ore total, buying the dynamite from the shop as needed. Hybrid ore uim smelt (Hybrid ore UIM smelting) your mithril from MLM. Smelt your lead ore into bars. Smelt your gold ore from MLM. Use the UIM gold method (Lazy UIM Gold) to train your smithing to level 70, getting permission from the foreman to use the blast furnace for free at level 60. Turn 5 mithril bars into 75 nails, then convert the rest into platebodies (Varrock west anvils, make 10 bars into 150 nails, make a mithril 2h sword for Devious Minds and ~5 bars into grapples along the way), then alch them (similar to before). Hybrid ore uim smelt your addy (buy coal as needed) into bars. Use UIM gold to train your smithing to (15,000 xp away from) level 74. Make sure to equip your ring of charos (a) until level 60 for reduced foreman costs. Start and complete Defender of Varrock (there’s a free 5k xp lamp after the quest at Historian Minas in the Varrock Museum, put it on slayer if you aren’t level 58 yet and herblore otherwise). Make 4950 adamant nails (make sure to save an adamantite bar) with your bars at Varrock west anvils. - Optional: you can go to level 70-73 only and boost for making the nails instead. - After this create 5 mithril grapples and complete and collect the rewards for the Ardougne medium diary, the Kandarin medium diary, the Lumbridge & Draynor medium diary (all lamps on slayer) and complete the grapple step for the Falador medium diary. - Now that you have a mithril grapple you can do the quests The Curse of Arrav and The Path of Glouphrie. It is recommended to do them now, but you can also leave them for later.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Do Blast Mining https://streamable.com/l3ylry to get to 330 addy ore total, buying the dynamite from the shop as needed.
Hybrid ore uim smelt (Hybrid ore UIM smelting) your mithril from MLM.
Smelt your lead ore into bars.
Smelt your gold ore from MLM.
Use the UIM gold method (Lazy UIM Gold) to train your smithing to level 70, getting permission from the foreman to use the blast furnace for free at level 60.

Turn 5 mithril bars into 75 nails, then convert the rest into platebodies (Varrock west anvils, make 10 bars into 150 nails, make a mithril 2h sword for Devious Minds and ~5 bars into grapples along the way), then alch them (similar to before).
Hybrid ore uim smelt your addy (buy coal as needed) into bars.
Use UIM gold to train your smithing to (15,000 xp away from) level 74.
Make sure to equip your ring of charos (a) until level 60 for reduced foreman costs.
Start and complete Defender of Varrock (there’s a free 5k xp lamp after the quest at Historian Minas in the Varrock Museum, put it on slayer if you aren’t level 58 yet and herblore otherwise).
Make 4950 adamant nails (make sure to save an adamantite bar) with your bars at Varrock west anvils..
Optional: you can go to level 70-73 only and boost for making the nails instead..

After this create 5 mithril grapples and complete and collect the rewards for the Ardougne medium diary, the Kandarin medium diary, the Lumbridge & Draynor medium diary (all lamps on slayer) and complete the grapple step for the Falador medium diary..
Now that you have a mithril grapple you can do the quests The Curse of Arrav and The Path of Glouphrie.
It is recommended to do them now, but you can also leave them for later.

steps.text: Note: if you are not planning to max you can reduce this step, although the lack of prayer potions might prove to be an issue for slayer later. You will also need to obtain more planks and train construction at your own convenience if you do not go to at least level 96 agility during this step. That being said, 98 agility at Sepulchre is a loooong grind, so give serious consideration to reducing/splitting it. Read this step in its entirety carefully. This step contains a huge Hallowed Sepulchre grind. - After level 82 agility you are good for a while, but there is no real reason not to continue at Sepulchre. It is optional but recommended to continue all the way to 98 agility. The following coffins are recommended: - Floor 4 has a bridge (only on ONE side, 20240224_F4_Bridge.png so on 50% of all runs). With a Hallowed hammer you will never break nails while attempting to build this bridge, and it is highly recommended to buy this hammer before reaching level 82 agility. - Floor 4 has an enchantment obstacle (only on ONE side, 20240224_F4_Enchant_and_Bridge.png so on 50% of all runs). This is efficient to loot barring exceptionally lucky circumstances - in practice this is always worth looting. The enchant works identically to that on floor 3. - Floor 5 always has an enchantment obstacle 20240224_F5_Enchant.png, a grapple obstacle 20240224_F5_Grapple.png and a bridge obstacle 20240224_F5_Bridge.png, followed by a grand coffin 20240224_F5_Grand_Coffin.png. Every single one of these is efficient to loot. - Floors 1-3 are not worth looting anymore, although if you are chasing collection log slots you have to loot these too. If you are using mahogany planks with rune nails (in BRUHsailer you will not be doing this) to build bridges it is efficient construction xp to build the bridge in floor 1 (on two out of four sides, so on 50% of all runs, 20240224_F1_Bridge_Coffin_West.png) but not to cross it. The enchant on f3 is the best of the technically inefficient looting options, so if you want to increase your loot a little this is the one to include in your runs. - You will be doing Fletchpalchre (fletching headless arrows and casting high alchemy while moving at sepulchre) all the way to 98 agility. Feel free to bring the herb sack and plank sack. Maintain hourlies. It is also possible to blow glass inside the sepulchre, this is even more efficient than other multiskilling options. Most of the time is spent alching, not fletching. - After Misc is up and running, buy arrow shafts(/cut them from maples) and buy feathers (in smaller chunks) to get to a total of 1 million headless arrows through fletchpalchre. - Alch (all) rune bolts for good magic xp along the way. - We recommend buying the initial helpful items first and then spending a lot of hallowed marks on hallowed crystal shards (the teleports). Doing this for levels 82-98 will on average grant the following loot and xp: - ~24.5m gp (not including the costs for fletching, nature runes, planks etc) - 565k thieving xp, 444k construction xp, ~600k fletching xp and 3.2m magic xp (primarily through alchs). - 6.1k cosmic runes (these are useful for enchanting bracelets for gp and jewellery for general use later) - 8.1k death runes - 44.7k law runes (these serve no long term purpose but can be used to fill a nexus, for example) - 44.7k blood runes (a good initial stack for barraging during slayer) - 44.7k soul runes (these have some uses for Arceuus and barrage spells, as well as being required for Tumeken’s Shadow eventually) - 12.7k adamant bolts (next to useless) - 1100 monkfish - 102 prayer potions (4) - 336 sanfew serums (4) (useful at DKS and the nightmare) - 152 grimy ranarr weeds - 336 ranarr seeds (~2.0k (4)-dose prayer potions when farmed, a good starting supply for slayer) - 72 strange lockpicks (for Barrows later, although the meta is to only do a little bit of barrows, using around 5-10 lockpicks) - 2.12 Rings of Endurance (88% chance to get at least one) - 16.2k hallowed teleport crystals - this is more teleports than you will likely use for banking on the road of all activities combined to maxing, so instead it is a good idea to partially save the hallowed marks (e.g. for future updates, potentially amylase) or spend it on loot sacks. - If you want a change of pace you can afk mine daeyalt essence for runecrafting later. There is also a high effort daeyalt (“dae-alch”) method: https://streamable.com/it7kry. - You can do this grind in smaller parts, or quit entirely at a lower agility level. Example setup here. - You can use Parasailer’s Hallowed Sepulchre calculator: 20240115 Hallowed Sepulchre: Looting to check your loot, xp, material requirements etc. and customise your strategy. A few notes: - This calculator only works for levels 82+, and does not include f1 bridge building for xp. If you wish to build this bridge adjust the number of bridges per run afterwards manually. - The sheet is default set to sell law and soul runes. To fix this go into the ‘High’ tab (bottom left) and uncheck the boxes for selling those runes. - The floor 4 brazier, 20240224_F4_Ash_Coffin.png, is not recommended as it is not efficient to collect the ash in the first place. If you already have some this is the best use for it though, after buying the hallowed symbol.
steps.itemsNeeded: crossbow, Sara items, teak planks, addy nails, hammer, fire staff, nature runes, a lot of money (obtained during the step, spent during the step).

sections.title: 2.3: Wait there’s even more quests? And one of them is Song of the Elves?

steps.text: At your own convenience make Catherby POH tabs for your herb runs (at the lectern on Lunar Isle). If you have reached level 70 fletching at Sepulchre (or are close enough you are willing to boost for it), teleport to Seers village and complete the Kandarin Hard diary, doing all remaining steps sequentially and putting the lamp on slayer. Remember that the goal is to lamp to 58 slayer, then go back to lamping herblore. Build the following in your POH, boosting when necessary: - Marble lectern - Spirit tree - Teak armour case - Mahogany cape rack - Teak fancy dress box - Mahogany magic wardrobe - Oak toy box - Teak treasure chest - One or two portal rooms (optional) (2 limestone bricks and 9 teak planks per room, plus 100x the teleport runes cost) - The total item requirements for this are: 1 marble block, 1 magic stone, 1 gold leaf, 1 spirit sapling, 19 oak planks, 17 teak planks, 8 mahogany planks. You may need to convert a few more logs into planks to get all these item requirements. - If you have a fish barrel, move your POH to Brimhaven (move it back after), then buy a few thousand (between 2,000 and 10,000 recommended) raw karambwans using the barrel method in this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zDkz186YgME. Karambwans are the best food at all levels, and give incredible cooking xp (using a method called ‘1t bwan cooking’). See OSRSRecklessLadHowDoesFoodWorkV2.pngfor information on how food works. Without the barrel, feel free to ignore this.
steps.itemsNeeded: crystal saw, hammer, items mentioned above

actions.text: At your own convenience make Catherby POH tabs for your herb runs (at the lectern on Lunar Isle).

If you have reached level 70 fletching at Sepulchre (or are close enough you are willing to boost for it), teleport to Seers village and complete the Kandarin Hard diary, doing all remaining steps sequentially and putting the lamp on slayer.
Remember that the goal is to lamp to 58 slayer, then go back to lamping herblore.
Build the following in your POH, boosting when necessary:.
Marble lectern.
Spirit tree.
Teak armour case.
Mahogany cape rack.
Teak fancy dress box.
Mahogany magic wardrobe.
Oak toy box.
Teak treasure chest.
One or two portal rooms (optional) (2 limestone bricks and 9 teak planks per room, plus 100x the teleport runes cost).
The total item requirements for this are: 1 marble block, 1 magic stone, 1 gold leaf, 1 spirit sapling, 19 oak planks, 17 teak planks, 8 mahogany planks.
You may need to convert a few more logs into planks to get all these item requirements..

If you have a fish barrel, move your POH to Brimhaven (move it back after), then buy a few thousand (between 2,000 and 10,000 recommended) raw karambwans using the barrel method in this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zDkz186YgME.
Karambwans are the best food at all levels, and give incredible cooking xp (using a method called ‘1t bwan cooking’).
See OSRSRecklessLadHowDoesFoodWorkV2.pngfor information on how food works.
Without the barrel, feel free to ignore this.

steps.text: Do the Mage Arena I miniquest, followed by the Mage Arena II miniquest. Pick your favourite god (Zamorak is slightly more useful than the others for protection in the God Wars Dungeon, but any choice is fine). Along the way/after mine a mithril ore at the Pirates’ Hideout mine and complete a lap of the Wilderness Agility course. Kill Chaos dwarves for a muddy key, open the muddy chest in the centre of the Lava Maze. Kill an ankou at the Forgotten Cemetery, then enter the God Wars Dungeon (god wars protection is necessary!) and kill a bloodveld - Optional: if you want multiple upgraded capes you can kill the bosses of Mage Arena II multiple times to obtain more capes. - The staff is necessary for the wilderness hard diary. After this you can high alch the staff for some gp, if you want.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Do the Mage Arena I miniquest, followed by the Mage Arena II miniquest.
Pick your favourite god (Zamorak is slightly more useful than the others for protection in the God Wars Dungeon, but any choice is fine).
Along the way/after mine a mithril ore at the Pirates’ Hideout mine and complete a lap of the Wilderness Agility course.
Kill Chaos dwarves for a muddy key, open the muddy chest in the centre of the Lava Maze.
Kill an ankou at the Forgotten Cemetery, then enter the God Wars Dungeon (god wars protection is necessary!) and kill a bloodveld.
Optional: if you want multiple upgraded capes you can kill the bosses of Mage Arena II multiple times to obtain more capes..
The staff is necessary for the wilderness hard diary.
After this you can high alch the staff for some gp, if you want.

steps.text: (POH) teleport to Rellekka, start The General’s Shadow miniquest. Teleport to Seers and speak with Sin Seer, then teleport to Rellekka and speak with the general again. Make your way to Lunar Isle. Start and complete Dream Mentor (lamp on ranged). Swap to the Lunar spellbook, teleport to Waterbirth, visit Jatizso and mine 5 adamantite ores after this step for two diary steps. POH teleport, make a super defence potion in Rellekka and collect the Fremennik hard diary, putting the lamp on herblore. Swap to Arceuus spellbook. Teleport to Draynor Manor and run out west for a scout for The General’s Shadow.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: teleport to Rellekka, start The General’s Shadow miniquest.
Teleport to Seers and speak with Sin Seer, then teleport to Rellekka and speak with the general again.
Make your way to Lunar Isle.
Start and complete Dream Mentor (lamp on ranged).
Swap to the Lunar spellbook, teleport to Waterbirth, visit Jatizso and mine 5 adamantite ores after this step for two diary steps.
POH teleport, make a super defence potion in Rellekka and collect the Fremennik hard diary, putting the lamp on herblore.
Swap to Arceuus spellbook.
Teleport to Draynor Manor and run out west for a scout for The General’s Shadow.

steps.text: Make a composite ogre bow (comp ogre bow) and 150 mithril brutal nails, kill 125 chompies for the diary. Speak with Rantz to collect a (handful of) Chompy bird hat(s). - Collect the Western Provinces easy and medium diaries at your own convenience, putting the lamps on herblore.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Make a composite ogre bow (comp ogre bow) and 150 mithril brutal nails, kill 125 chompies for the diary.
Speak with Rantz to collect a (handful of) Chompy bird hat(s)..
Collect the Western Provinces easy and medium diaries at your own convenience, putting the lamps on herblore.

steps.text: Make 20 bolts of linen. Build the mahogany mast and canvas sails using the hemp you farmed, build the mithril helm on your skiff (not sloop) and the inoculation station on both your sloop. Do the Jubbly Jive barracuda trial and complete up to the shark rank. Build a wind catcher on both your skiff and your sloop, then return to the Jubbly Jive and keep training sailing to level 67 sailing using the following method for Marlin rank: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1d2LIrd7_rM. At your convenience, return to the Ardent Ocean meteorologists for those charting tasks. Optional but not recommended: if you prefer alternative training methods you can choose between Rellekka courier tasks (Sailing training - OSRS Wiki) or salvaging over Jubbly Jive. - You now have access to Deepfin Point, which contains the best method for ironmenn to obtain blue dragon scales (using the general store in the mine), even beating out harvesting potato cactus.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Make 20 bolts of linen.
Build the mahogany mast and canvas sails using the hemp you farmed, build the mithril helm on your skiff (not sloop) and the inoculation station on both your sloop.
Do the Jubbly Jive barracuda trial and complete up to the shark rank.

Build a wind catcher on both your skiff and your sloop, then return to the Jubbly Jive and keep training sailing to level 67 sailing using the following method for Marlin rank: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1d2LIrd7_rM.
At your convenience, return to the Ardent Ocean meteorologists for those charting tasks.
Optional but not recommended: if you prefer alternative training methods you can choose between Rellekka courier tasks (Sailing training.
OSRS Wiki) or salvaging over Jubbly Jive..
You now have access to Deepfin Point, which contains the best method for ironmenn to obtain blue dragon scales (using the general store in the mine), even beating out harvesting potato cactus.

steps.text: Teleport to Varrock, take the spirit tree to The Grand Tree. Run south and meet the scout outside the gate for The General’s Shadow. POH tab to Brimhaven, run to The General’s Shadow scout north of Shilo village and progress the miniquest.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Travel to the Tree Gnome Stronghold.
(Make sure to have two empty inventory slots to start the quest).
Talk to King Narnode.
Go up to Hazelmere, on the island east of Yanille. Fairy ring CLS or minigame teleport near Yanille.
Talk to Hazelmere.
Return to King Narnode in the Grand Tree.
Go up to Glough in the Tree Gnome Stronghold.
Talk to Glough.
Talk to King Narnode again in the Grand Tree.
Talk to Charlie.
Talk to King Narnode outside Charlie's cell.
Travel with the glider to escape.
Enter the shipyard on Karamja.
Get the Lumber order from the Foreman on the southern docks. You can either kill him or talk to him.
Go up to Glough's house again.
Search the chest in Glough's
Take the invasion plans to King Narnode in the Grand Tree.
Climb up the tree to the watchtower in Glough's house.
Place the twigs (T). Return to King Narnode if you lost them.
Place the twigs (U). Return to King Narnode if you lost them.
Place the twigs (Z). Return to King Narnode if you lost them.
Place the twigs (O). Return to King Narnode if you lost them.
Place the twigs to spell 'TUZO' in the watchtower in Glough's house. Return to King Narnode if you lost any.
Go down the trap door. Be prepared for the fight against a Black Demon (level 172).
Talk to Glough. You can safespot the Demon from where he stands.
Kill the black Demon. You can safespot from where Glough stands.
Go down the trap door again.
Talk to King Narnode deeper in the cave.
Give the Daconia stone to King Narnode under the Grand Tree.
Search the roots under the Grand Tree until you find the Daconia stone. If you lose the rock, it will be in the same root again.
Run south and meet the scout outside the gate for The General’s Shadow.
POH tab to Brimhaven, run to The General’s Shadow scout north of Shilo village and progress the miniquest.

steps.text: Fairy ring to Zanaris, resume and complete Fairytale II - Cure a Queen (xp on slayer). Take fairy ring BIQ to the desert and meet up with the scout for The General’s Shadow.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Fairy ring to Zanaris, resume and complete Fairytale II.
Cure a Queen (xp on slayer).
Take fairy ring BIQ to the desert and meet up with the scout for The General’s Shadow.

steps.text: Teleport (tab) to Rellekka, speak with General Khazard to give him the message and get a severed leg.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Teleport (tab) to Rellekka, speak with General Khazard to give him the message and get a severed leg.

steps.text: Teleport to Lumbridge. Go into the Dorgeshuun mines and start Land of the Goblins. After being teleported to the goblin caves, finish The General's Shadow, then continue Land of the Goblins and complete it in full (the transportation is awkward, you could swap to the Lunar spellbook but there is no good way to Draynor in that case. There is a crate with an unlimited supply of goblin mails directly east inside the temple, beyond the guards).
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Teleport to Lumbridge.
Go into the Dorgeshuun mines and start Land of the Goblins.

After being teleported to the goblin caves, finish The General's Shadow, then continue Land of the Goblins and complete it in full (the transportation is awkward, you could swap to the Lunar spellbook but there is no good way to Draynor in that case.
There is a crate with an unlimited supply of goblin mails directly east inside the temple, beyond the guards).

steps.text: Complete the Kourend Medium diary and cash in the reward (lamp on herblore). Skills/quests met?:
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Complete the Kourend Medium diary and cash in the reward (lamp on herblore).
Skills/quests met?:

steps.text: Kill the following for Rag and Bone Man II, then complete the quest: - Ogres (fairy ring CIQ). - Mogres (fairy ring to AIQ, only spot), complete ‘Skippy and the Mogres’ in full for this. - Optional but recommended: keep killing these to collect flippers for seaweed runs - Basilisks (fairy ring to AJR, only spot). - Trolls (if you didn’t get it along the way during questing).
steps.itemsNeeded: melee gear, prayer potions, mirror shield, law runes, soul runes, dramen staff, fishing explosives

actions.text: Kill the following for Rag and Bone Man II, then complete the quest:.
Ogres (fairy ring CIQ)..
Mogres (fairy ring to AIQ, only spot), complete ‘Skippy and the Mogres’ in full for this..
Optional but recommended: keep killing these to collect flippers for seaweed runs.
Basilisks (fairy ring to AJR, only spot)..
Trolls (if you didn’t get it along the way during questing).

steps.text: Go to Edgeville dungeon, run into the wilderness and collect 5 red spider’s eggs (you can drop and pick up the same one five times), cross the handrail and kill an earth warrior. Go back to Edgeville, speak with the Emblem Trader. Collect the easy and medium wilderness diary rewards, putting the lamps on herblore.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

actions.text: Go to Edgeville dungeon, run into the wilderness and collect 5 red spider’s eggs (you can drop and pick up the same one five times), cross the handrail and kill an earth warrior.
Go back to Edgeville, speak with the Emblem Trader.
Collect the easy and medium wilderness diary rewards, putting the lamps on herblore.

steps.text: Do Grim Tales. Use the tool leprechaun to withdraw your watering can/seed dibber mid-quest. After the quest, at some point enter the Falador mines, equip your dwarven helmet for the diary. Alch it after. Also collect the Falador medium diary rewards, putting the lamp on herblore.
steps.itemsNeeded: 2 vials of water, 2 tarromins, leather gloves, rune axe, cheese potatoes, Iban staff, death runes, fire runes, water runes, air staff, law runes, dueling ring, prayer pots, energy pots

actions.text: Do Grim Tales.
Use the tool leprechaun to withdraw your watering can/seed dibber mid-quest.
After the quest, at some point enter the Falador mines, equip your dwarven helmet for the diary.
Alch it after.
Also collect the Falador medium diary rewards, putting the lamp on herblore.

steps.text: Do Rum Deal (return with Ectophial), killing a fever spider along the way for the diary. Do Cabin Fever (speak with Bill Teach after the quest for 10k gp) and complete a game of trouble brewing (recommended: do the watering buckets only strat to get enough points to buy “the stuff” for future brewing). Do The Great Brain Robbery (put the lamp on Herblore), planting watermelons in the allotment patch for the diary along the way. Complete the Morytania medium diary (and easy if you haven’t yet), putting the lamp(s) on Herblore.
steps.itemsNeeded: Ectophial, melee gear, cheese potatoes, prayer pots, stat-boosting pots, energy pots, fishbowl helmet + diving apparatus, 18 planks, 10 bear fur, hammer, holy symbol, ring of charos(a), bowl, 15 chaos runes, law runes, fire runes, air staff, rune axe, fremennik boots, watermelon seeds, ultracompost, rake, seed dibber

actions.text: Do Rum Deal (return with Ectophial), killing a fever spider along the way for the diary.

Do Cabin Fever (speak with Bill Teach after the quest for 10k gp) and complete a game of trouble brewing (recommended: do the watering buckets only strat to get enough points to buy “the stuff” for future brewing).
Do The Great Brain Robbery (put the lamp on Herblore), planting watermelons in the allotment patch for the diary along the way.
Complete the Morytania medium diary (and easy if you haven’t yet), putting the lamp(s) on Herblore.

steps.text: Make sure you have a runite bar (if you do not you have three options: 1) hunt Magpie implings in Puro Puro; 2) kill Vyrewatch Sentinels for 1/46.5; 3) trade rune platelegs for one at Nest (nice) - OSRS Wiki. This third method is recommended). Do the entire elf quest line: Regicide, Roving Elves, Mourning’s End Part I, Mourning’s End Part II, Song of the Elves. Pick the crystal bow reward from Roving Elves. You have all but one item on the regular part of the 50 item list for MEPII – you are missing unicorn horn dust (and whiteberries if you didn’t save any). Furthermore you need the randomly chosen ticket, book and key (all are easy to obtain). You may also want a spare hammer and chisel. Also make sure to farm belladonna(/nightshade) in the Draynor patch to collect at least 8 nightshades for the Seren fight (optional: use explosive liquid from the digsite instead), and also buy blood+death runes and make 6-10 phoenix necklaces. - Check out the quest guides for complicated steps, use ancients + phoenix necklaces and nightshade/belladonna for the Seren fight. - Rock cake and ds2 orb do work in the Seren fight, contrary to wiki and other sources. However, activating them is negated when there is a ranged projectile incoming (this is normal behaviour for these items). This means you can use them to maintain your hitpoints level, but cannot use them to proc the phoenix necklaces during special attacks. - Example clip: OSRS Song of the Elves boss with phoenix necklaces (no brews) - If you are really struggling with the Seren fight an alternative option is to make several Guthix Rests which don’t delay your next attack when drunk, and also make it very easy to manage your HP during the fight for phoenix necklace procs. - Fragment of Seren written guideexplains the methods for defeating the Fragment of Seren in detail on a low level ironman.

actions.text: Make sure you have a runite bar (if you do not you have three options: 1) hunt Magpie implings in Puro Puro; 2) kill Vyrewatch Sentinels for 1/46.5; 3) trade rune platelegs for one at Nest (nice).
OSRS Wiki.
This third method is recommended).

Enter the well.

Follow the path along and hop over the leaves.

Cross the log from the camp.

Kill the guard.

Go through the dense forest north then to the west, and fight the guard there.

Take 2 barrels from the Tyras Camp.
Return back out the camp, to the east, then south to the traps and cross them.

Pick up some sulphur.
Read the big book of bangs.
Use some limestone on a furnace whilst wearing gloves.

Use a pestle and mortar on some sulphur.

Add the ground sulphur to the naphtha mix.

Talk to Arianwyn outside Ardougne Castle.
Traverse the Underground Pass.
and talk to her (If Idris does not appear in the couple minutes enter and exit the cave). Afterwards, Go talk to Lord Iorwerth in the north west of the elven forest.
Return to Lord Iorwerth in the north west of
Go talk to the Elven Tracker in the south of the forest.
Return to the Elven Tracker in the south of the forest.

Talk to the Elven Tracker again.
Climb through the dense forest near the Tracker, and defeat the guard you find. This requires 56
Fill some barrels with tar, pick up some sulphur there, and then return to Lord Iorwerth.

Underground Pass again.

You have all but one item on the regular part of the 50 item list for MEPII – you are missing unicorn horn dust (and whiteberries if you didn’t save any).
Furthermore you need the randomly chosen ticket, book and key (all are easy to obtain).

Also make sure to farm belladonna(/nightshade) in the Draynor patch to collect at least 8 nightshades for the Seren fight (optional: use explosive liquid from the digsite instead), and also buy blood+death runes and make 6-10 phoenix necklaces..
Check out the quest guides for complicated steps, use ancients + phoenix necklaces and nightshade/belladonna for the Seren fight..
Rock cake and ds2 orb do work in the Seren fight, contrary to wiki and other sources.
However, activating them is negated when there is a ranged projectile incoming (this is normal behaviour for these items).
This means you can use them to maintain your hitpoints level, but cannot use them to proc the phoenix necklaces during special attacks..
Example clip: OSRS Song of the Elves boss with phoenix necklaces (no brews).

If you are really struggling with the Seren fight an alternative option is to make several Guthix Rests which don’t delay your next attack when drunk, and also make it very easy to manage your HP during the fight for phoenix necklace procs..

chapters.title: Chapter 3: The longest home stretch you’ve ever seen

steps.text: If you are running low on/out of (redirected) POH tabs collect more soft clay using the gravestone method in the prifddinas mine Gravestone Double Soft Clay (2400/hr). You will have to make soft clay bracelets first. Go to NMZ (optionally as an afk activity) to collect redirection scrolls as necessary. It is recommended to collect a good stack (i.e. 500 tabs and 250 scrolls). Also make Catherby tabs for herb runs.

steps.text: Optional but recommended: go to the Mage Training Arena and collect the Mage’s book and the infinity boots.

actions.text: Optional but recommended: go to the Mage Training Arena and collect the Mage’s book and the infinity boots.

steps.text: Using your mahogany logs from Miscellania, train construction to level 75 (do not go higher for now). Build the following in your POH, boosting when necessary: - Dark altar - Basic jewellery box - Rejuvenation pool (if you somehow have the staminas) - Mahogany armour case - Mahogany fancy dress box - Gilded cape rack - Gilded portal nexus (optional but not recommended) - The total item requirements for this are: 1 Arceuus signet, 1 bolt of cloth, 1 steel bar, 3 games necklaces(8), 3 rings of dueling(8), 8 marble blocks (for the gilded portal nexus), 3 gold leaves (of which two are for the gilded portal nexus), 1 magic stone (but 2 if you want to build the bank chest on Sunbleak Island), 15 limestone bricks, 5 buckets of water, 6000 soul runes, 5000 blood runes, 1000 body runes, 10 stamina potions(4), 10 prayer potions(4), 9 mahogany planks. - Note: if you want to have a rejuvenation pool (or the likes) in your POH feel free to do some rooftops, for example force spawning (see later in the guide for the best method), for marks of grace to get the required items.

The total item requirements for this are: 1 Arceuus signet, 1 bolt of cloth, 1 steel bar, 3 games necklaces(8), 3 rings of dueling(8), 8 marble blocks (for the gilded portal nexus), 3 gold leaves (of which two are for the gilded portal nexus), 1 magic stone (but 2 if you want to build the bank chest on Sunbleak Island), 15 limestone bricks, 5 buckets of water, 6000 soul runes, 5000 blood runes, 1000 body runes, 10 stamina potions(4), 10 prayer potions(4), 9 mahogany planks..

Note: if you want to have a rejuvenation pool (or the likes) in your POH feel free to do some rooftops, for example force spawning (see later in the guide for the best method), for marks of grace to get the required items.

steps.text: Now that you have daeyalt mining https://streamable.com/it7kry unlocked, mine 28k daeyalt essence (you can also just afk mine this). Make 275 binding necklaces, 175 rings of dueling, a fire tiara, buy 28k earth runes (if needed). Swap to the Lunar spellbook. Using magic imbue, your binding necklaces and hallowed crystal shards (teleports) for banking, lava runecraft to 425,000 xp (level 64, midway to level 65). After this, start and complete The Final Dawn, putting the xp on prayer. The Arkan blade is now your default special attack weapon when meleeing. It is stronger than the dragon dagger. The Arkan blade is also sometimes better (typically against stab weak enemies) than the Dragon scimitar as a mainhand weapon. - Complete the Lumbridge Hard diary, putting the lamp on herblore. - Complete the Ardougne Hard diary (also requires a shield left half).

Complete the Ardougne Hard diary (also requires a shield left half).

steps.text: Camp Cave Horrors off-task for a black mask (protect melee allows an amulet of strength, so use your regular slayer gear, proselyte hauberk versus torso is fine either way, use thralls, take your herb sack). Start and complete the Morytania Hard diary (lamp on herblore). Visit Robin twice a day with 13 bones each time to collect 130 ectotokens for bonecrusher charges (3250 charges per day - you will need 24k charges to complete step 12 of this chapter) – collect the bones on any slayer task (for example regular/big/baby dragon). Imbue your black mask at the PVP Arena (imbue scroll via pvp arena - losing method) or nightmare zone. An example setup (except for the black mask and expeditious bracelets, obviously) iscave-horrors.png. The recommended spot is cave-horrors.png(northwest from the entrance).

steps.text: Buy 2300 sand (the goal is to get to level 70 crafting, each sand is approximately 88.1 xp) from the grinder (buy bucket packs as needed, e.g. at Alice’s farming shop near the ectofuntus). Superglass Make them into glass (18:3 no pickup). Blow all the glass into unpowered orbs doing artefacts, i.e. doing arteglass, to get to level 70 crafting. Do Pyramid Plunder for one (or two, it is recommended to get the second at/after level 91 thieving) sceptre(s) using the sceptre + xp method - all chests, sarcs in level 51+ rooms, urns in the level 81 room optional. Collect gold artefacts along the way - just bank them when your inv fills up, you’ll only need ~200 or so later. - Example setup for xp method pyramid plunder. - World hop to find a world with a North mummy room. The mummy resets every now and again, hop to find a new world. - On all but the last room do chest and sarc first then check the doors, ignore the urns. On the last room do urns first, then chest, then sarc, then leave. - If you haven’t already, it is worth making ~100 superantipoison potions (kill cows, for example at the crafting guild, to get cowhides, then use the Tower of Life to make unicows for noted unicorn horns, then make superantipoison potions). You can use a gravestone method to transfer the supplies required to the Tower of Life, though this requires a decent (28-42) initial supply of both hides and horns so it is probably not useful for just this step. - Use (super) energy potions and/or vile vigour for this. If you want to get full graceful first you could force spawn for it, though it’s not as good without the Ardougne elite diary.
steps.itemsNeeded: Superantipoison potions, any food

at Alice’s farming shop near the ectofuntus).

doing arteglass, to get to level 70 crafting.

all chests, sarcs in level 51+ rooms, urns in the level 81 room optional.

Example setup for xp method pyramid plunder..
World hop to find a world with a North mummy room.
The mummy resets every now and again, hop to find a new world..
On all but the last room do chest and sarc first then check the doors, ignore the urns.
On the last room do urns first, then chest, then sarc, then leave..

If you haven’t already, it is worth making ~100 superantipoison potions (kill cows, for example at the crafting guild, to get cowhides, then use the Tower of Life to make unicows for noted unicorn horns, then make superantipoison potions).

You can use a gravestone method to transfer the supplies required to the Tower of Life, though this requires a decent (28-42) initial supply of both hides and horns so it is probably not useful for just this step..
Use (super) energy potions and/or vile vigour for this.
If you want to get full graceful first you could force spawn for it, though it’s not as good without the Ardougne elite diary.

steps.text: Train slayer to get to 100cb. Your target stats are 78 Attack, 85 Strength, 75(+) Defence and 72(+) prayer, which should probably give you 78(+)Hitpoints and ~75 Slayer around the time you hit 100cb. - Keep Strength around 10-15 levels ahead of Attack until it hits 83. At level 75 Attack make Arclight. Generally you only use accurate/aggressive/shared and get your bulk defence xp from defensive cast barrage tasks. Use piety whenever you’re using melee. - If you get an amulet of glory from dragon imps along the way use it for magic slayer tasks, not melee ones. - Unlock Broader Fletching. If you happen to get to a good slayer point situation, purchase the slayer helmet and complete the Desert Hard diary. - At level 90 magic you can use divine magic potions to stay at level 94 for entire (barrage) tasks and use ice barrage, if not you’ll have to use smoke barrage for ankou/dust devils and ice burst for dagannoths. Make sure to cast the spells on defensive. - Check out 20251019SlayerGuide for advice on efficient slayer at this point. - If you (somehow) do not have runes for thralls or barrage, buy them. - Use your Pharaoh’s sceptre to teleport to the ancient magicks pyramid (Jaldraocht) to swap to the ancient spellbook when needed, and your POH Dark altar to swap to Arceuus when needed. When your sceptre is at 1 charge teleport to Pyramid Plunder (Jalsavrah) with 6 gold artefacts to recharge it to 25 charges. - At your own convenience, complete the quest While Guthix Sleeps along the way. Grab the 100 magic logs during the quest for Shades of Mort’ton (for bloodbark) later. Alternatively, postpone the quest until after the Corrupted Gauntlet. - Along the way you will hit milestones for the following diaries, complete them at your convenience along the way, putting all lamps on herblore: - At any point: save a shield left half (if you get one) for the Ardougne Hard diary - 62 slayer - Kourend Hard diary - 68 slayer - Wilderness Hard diary - 72 slayer - Falador Hard diary - Slayer Helmet - Desert Hard diary - This also requires killing the Kalphite Queen. One of the more efficient ways to do this is by using thralls only, since this also completes the Combat Achievements task of only attacking with a Verac’s Flail. See 0 HP XP Kalphite Queen (Thralls) OSRSor OSRS 'Prayer Smasher' Elite Combat Achievement - Without Verac's Flailfor example kills. Keep in mind you need to splash all the grasp attacks. - 100 combat level - Karamja Hard diary - After completing the Karamja Hard diary, mine gems in the underground gem mine, cut them in the bank, sell them for trading sticks at Gabooty (10 opal/10 jade/1 red topaz per world, wear your Karamja gloves) to get 100k trading sticks. In total this takes 520 cut opals, 520 cut jades and 52 red topazes (keep additional red topaz and a good amount of opals for slayer bracelets. Buy to a total of 10k karambwans at Tiadeche (using a Ring of Endurance, Vile Vigour and three client hopping for the best rates), banking with Rionasta’s parcel service. Video: Shopscape Karambwans. Do the Kourend & Kebos Hard diary (lamp on RC), then cook the karambwans at your convenience (1t cooking at the Hosidius range is best, cooking gauntlets do not work on karambwans). - If you previously bought bwans in Chapter 2, you won’t need as many now. Only buy the difference (or postpone it for later, if you wish). - Alternatively, use the (less macroefficient but faster) Yazota/Brimhaven POH portal method for buying bwans https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zDkz186YgME) instead, which requires the fish barrel. - 100 combat level - Western Provinces Diary (included for completeness, ignore this diary for now). - Along the way complete a long list of Combat Achievement diary tasks, exported to a separate document for readability. 20240131CombatAchievementPointReworkCA shows a list of all tasks that can be included at or before this step. CA's during Chapter 3 step 07 is an older document going into more detail on the slayer-related tasks (but note that some of these are no longer recommended!). If you are missing any of these tasks by the time you reach 100cb, go do them (stew boosting slayer as necessary). Collect the easy and medium Combat Achievement rewards, lamping herblore. - Complete His Faithful Servants along the way.

steps.text: Optional but recommended: collect buckets of sand and giant seaweed to train your crafting level to 80 (or 75, boosting after) using SGM and arteglass. Make an amulet of glory. Regardless of whether you include the above: buy broad arrowhead packs with most of your money (leave ~500k in reserve, buy the broad arrowtip packs at any slayer master, if you are opening fast enough the stock will slowly deplete. Hop worlds if the stock ever hits 700 or lower). Do Pest Control, veteran i.e. 100+ cb boat, for enough points for full elite void range (other two helmets optional) while fletching – 1250 points for just ranging, 1650 points for a full set, fletching during the games and only contributing as much as necessary to get points. You can optionally get the other two helmets as well, or ignore them(/consider getting them later).

steps.text: Do the Fremennik Exiles, A Night at the Theatre (lamps on ranging), Hopespear’s Will. Start Monkey Madness II until you have access to Kruk’s Dungeon (with the Maniacal monkeys). - If you don’t have the fremennik shield yet, get it from Bardur with a ring of charos (a).
steps.itemsNeeded: tons and tons of items (these are linear quests so just follow the wiki)

actions.text: Do the Fremennik Exiles, A Night at the Theatre (lamps on ranging), Hopespear’s Will.
Start Monkey Madness II until you have access to Kruk’s Dungeon (with the Maniacal monkeys)..
If you don’t have the fremennik shield yet, get it from Bardur with a ring of charos (a).

steps.text: Catch 20k red chinchompas between Tal Teklan and Kastori TalTeklanChinSpot.png or 16k black chinchompas (for 92 ranged, if you have extras then can consider throwing for more Ranged XP or using them for your first fire cape if you’re good at speed strats) in the wilderness. Follow this guide for catching chins: OSRS Easy 1t Hunter Guide (In-Depth). If you want to catch red chinchompas but the Varlamore spot is too competitive, e.g. with bots, the second best option is catching them northeast of Prifddinas. Throw the chins in the cave to get to 70 ranging, complete the Western Provinces Hard Diary (this involves getting one Zulrah kill), upgrade your void to Elite, (optionally: grab an offtask fire cape at some point along the way), return and throw the chins to get to level 92 ranging. - Make sure to use ranging potions and a bonecrusher (with at least 24k charges), your elite void ranged, mixed hide boots, a berserker ring (i), an amulet of strength, a crystal halberd for speccing, a mixed hide cape and carry death charge runes. Also note that chins are not lost in death, so you could carry more and extend the trip. Use medium fuse. Use protect melee and eagle eye, the regular potion drops will maintain your prayer (but bring a few to be safe, along with a teleport out). Also note that chins are not lost in death, so you could carry more and extend the trip. - Example setup for catching chins. - Example setup for throwing chins. However, this gear is outdated - use mixed hide boots, a berserker ring (i), an amulet of strength, a crystal halberd for speccing, a mixed hide cape and carry death charge runes. - Example setup for Zulrah diary kill, using blood barrage(/blitz). https://streamable.com/l64fsw example kill. - Pre-99 Chinchompa Calculatorfor checking the numbers. - If you want to go for a lower ranged level https://i.imgur.com/j291MJI.png shows the max hits of the corrupted bow (t3 bow in the corrupted gauntlet) by level with eagle eye, levels 89 and 87 are reasonable alternative stopping points. This will make CG more difficult and slower and also reduce your max hits once you do get the bow though. - If you do not want to train with chinchompas (which are best by far) you could alternatively afk it in the nightmare zone. The nightmare zone has super ranging pots, making it the best afk ranged training method by far. The recommended afk range NMZ method is: - Wear (elite) void, a magic shortbow (i), rune arrows, amulet of glory, shayzien boots (5). - Use the Hawk Eye (10%) prayer, no overhead. - Rock cake(/DS2 orb) down to 1hp, use absorption potions, repeat this approximately every 6-9 minutes (it’s fine to go to higher health in between and lose more absorption charges, the goal is to have it afk. Some other guides will recommend resetting every minute or flicking rapid heal, this is a waste of time). - Use the super ranging potions (duh), resetting along with the rock cake + absorption pots + prayer pot sips (for hawk eye). - Use hard custom rumble (not standard!). Bitterkoekje’s DPS Calculator has a tab for NMZ DPS on set 1, so verify for yourself. Generally the recommended list of enemies is: - Moss Giant - Sand Snake - Count Draynor - King Roald - Witch’s Experiment (this choice might depend on level, use the DPS calculator to verify). - Optional and not recommended: you could detour for a zombie axe from armoured zombies at Zemouregal’s Fort (the higher level ones are better) with barrage spells, then use that along with a rune crossbow at the Royal Titans, specifically Eldric the Ice King, with the goal of unlocking the Deadeye prayer. This allows you to reduce the ranged level target from 92 to 89. Alternatively, you can knock out this scroll (and the other one) after CG, getting much faster kills.
steps.itemsNeeded: red/black chins, elite void ranged, ranging pots, glory, shayzien boots 5, red dragonhide shield optional.

actions.text: Catch 20k red chinchompas between Tal Teklan and Kastori TalTeklanChinSpot.png or 16k black chinchompas (for 92 ranged, if you have extras then can consider throwing for more Ranged XP or using them for your first fire cape if you’re good at speed strats) in the wilderness.
Follow this guide for catching chins: OSRS Easy 1t Hunter Guide (In-Depth).
If you want to catch red chinchompas but the Varlamore spot is too competitive, e.g.
with bots, the second best option is catching them northeast of Prifddinas.

Throw the chins in the cave to get to 70 ranging, complete the Western Provinces Hard Diary (this involves getting one Zulrah kill), upgrade your void to Elite, (optionally: grab an offtask fire cape at some point along the way), return and throw the chins to get to level 92 ranging..

Make sure to use ranging potions and a bonecrusher (with at least 24k charges), your elite void ranged, mixed hide boots, a berserker ring (i), an amulet of strength, a crystal halberd for speccing, a mixed hide cape and carry death charge runes.
Also note that chins are not lost in death, so you could carry more and extend the trip.
Use medium fuse.
Use protect melee and eagle eye, the regular potion drops will maintain your prayer (but bring a few to be safe, along with a teleport out).

steps.text: The following steps 11-15 are best combined, to break up the CG grind with skilling activities. Read ahead to combine these steps at your convenience. Optional but recommended: with the Karamja Hard diary completed, 3t gem mine to level 97 mining (gems route), banking the uncut gems using the deposit box. This requires a charged amulet of glory. With multiskill cutting the gems (see below) this is more efficient than 3t4g. This requires a charged amulet of glory! If you make one here you won’t have to make one next step. You may skip this step if you don’t value multiskilling or efficiency enough to take such a long detour/don’t feel like it.

steps.text: Make sure you have at least 75 mining (if not, do some gem mining first). Sail to Deepfin Point, mine 24 nickel ore. Do blast mining (as before) to obtain 551 addy ore - you may have to convert some of the gems into alchs (cut sapphires, emeralds and even rubies are fine, or make ruby and diamond bracelets) for dynamite. Make sure you get at least 15 runite ore along the way. Smelt all the addy into bars, all the nickel into cupronickel bars, then convert 71 addy bars into 1065 addy nails. Teleport to The Great Conch (fairy ring CJQ) and chop and bank up to 498 camphor logs. The fastest method is using a log basket and teleporting out to a bank, then using the fairy ring to get back. If you have (or plan to get) sawmill vouchers you can reduce the number of logs needed by 1 for each voucher for up to 233 vouchers (and 265 logs), saving 2,500 gp each (582,500 gp total). Make 466 camphor planks. Build the following ship upgrades: - Camphor cargo hold (sloop) - Adamant keel (skiff + sloop) - Camphor hull (skiff + sloop) - Camphor mast and canvas sails (skiff + sloop) - this requires a boost to build - Optional but recommended (see next step): adamant cannon x2 (sloop) - this requires a boost to build. Note that your salvaging hooks are in the way - you can just discard the mithril ones, but for higher tiers you’d use Facility bottle - OSRS Wiki at 75k gp each to swap your facilities around.
steps.itemsNeeded: yes

steps.text: Optional: recruit Cabin Boy Jenkins (and Adventurer Ada while you’re at it) so you can get most xp out of multiskilling while charting. Use your skiff to chart the Sunset Ocean and Western Ocean in full, the lower level seas in the Shrouded Ocean along with all Miscellaneous charts in the same areas. Buy 5k?? mithril cannonballs at Port Roberts. Collect your charting xp bonuses from Chartin’ Charles McAtless. Optional and recommended, if you care for the rewards below from ship combat: also buy 25 Perildance bitters. Swap your kraken ink stout barrel on the sloop for perildance bitter. Recruit Oarswoman Olga and Jittery Jim (boost to recruit him) and assign them to your sloop. Collect port bounty tasks for the following activities. Note that bounty tasks are not bound to a specific location - you should teleport around to check all boards that can assign your desired target, regardless of where you want to do the task. Also most creatures drop two different bounty task items, so you can double dip on the xp by collecting both. See Bounty tasks - OSRS Wiki for more info. - Charting: - First do part of the Shrouded Ocean Shrouded Ocean, partial.png, starting at Corsair Cove (teleport there and recover your boat). Make sure to visit the Isle of Bones to collect the small key (Lost schematics - OSRS Wiki) and investigate the cauldron to get a medallion fragment, include the additional south step of visiting the Charred Island for another key, dock at Tear of the Soul for a third key, and later still collect the gale catcher schematic on Angler’s retreat. - Then the Western Ocean, continuing where the previous part ended. Western Ocean, part 1.png. Warning: the crates in the Backwater will poison, disease and venom you (two different crates total) so bring an antipoison. Dock on Minotaur’s Rest to collect the small key, dock at Vatrachos Island and give the raccoon a berry (Raccoon (Vatrachos Island) - OSRS Wiki) to get a medallion fragment, dock at Wintumber Island to chart the crab monument and collect a medallion piece, then later dock at the Crown Jewel to collect the rosewood cargo hold schematic. The bottle of portal nexus perry will teleport you to the Abyss so drink it last. - Then chart the Sunset Ocean, starting from Aldarin twice: first with your raft (pink), then with your skiff (red). Sunset Ocean.png It is possible to only use the skiff, if you prefer, but the raft is easier. Dock at the Laguna Aurorae to collect a small key and at the Shimmering Atoll to obtain the rosewood hull schematic and chop a teak tree to obtain a medallion fragment. - Then more Western Ocean, starting at Land’s EndWestern Ocean, part 2.png. The bottle of sea shandy 2 will teleport you and your ship to Port Sarim, so dock at Port Piscarilius before drinking it and charter back (and recover your ship). - Then more Western Ocean, continuing where the previous part ended. Western Ocean, part 3.png. Watch out, the bottle of banker’s draught (south Port Poscarilius) will bank your items - drink this last. - Then more Western Ocean, continuing where the previous part ended. Western Ocean, part 4.png. Dock at Ynysdail to collect the small key, then dock at Lledrith to collect the dragon salvaging hook schematic. Drinking the bottle of delicate elven wine will knock you out and put you at Isafdar (with your boat at Port Tyras), so dock at Port Tyras before drinking it. - Bounty tasks: - Stingray - 16 ray barbs for 2x cotton trawling net (best net for deepsea trawling). Kill them east off the coast of Aldarin, make sure to collect tasks for both fins and skins. - Albatross - 5 swift albatross feathers for a gale catcher on your skiff. Kill them southeast of Etceteria, make sure to collect tasks for both beaks and feathers (which are different from swift feathers). Watch out, these require repair kits to stave off the damage. - Narwhal - 1 narwhal horn for a chum spreader (for deepsea trawling). Kill them southwest of Miscellania (dock at Etceteria). Make sure to collect tasks for both tusks and blubber. - The bottled storm (dropped by vampyre krakens) and some high tier dragon upgrades are currently not included in the guide. Likely these will be higher level content, even after the upcoming ship combat rework. If you want to go for these it is likely best to do so after finishing the charting.

steps.text: If you have at least 825,000 sailing XP, boost to build an adamant helm on both your sloop and your skiff, then complete charting the Shrouded Ocean (if you do not, choose a training method between Jubbly Jive, courier tasks, bounty tasks or salvaging and get enough xp) by charting to Deepfin Point and following the following route Shrouded Ocean, part 2.png. Train your woodcutting to level 80 (e.g. at teaks or sulliusceps), then travel (back) to Sunbleak Island, collect the dragon helm schematic and build the bank chest there if you want to (if you intend to afk woodcut, ironwood trees are a very good option - take lunar Plank Make to produce 4 planks on the island) and chop enough logs for 20 ironwood planks, taking into account plank vouchers if you have them. Take your skiff to the Gwenith Glide and complete at least up to the shark rank, unlocking the Heart of ithell, and to 1,225,000 xp (level 75) - whichever comes later, you need both.

steps.text: Go to Guardians of the Rift, participate in the minigame with the multiskilling method until you are completely out of uncut gems. - Guardians of the Rift - multiskilling - this video shows a simple example of multiskill Guardians of the Rift - you still make combination runes, but focus on skilling rather than participating throughout most of the game (in fact, you only enter the west essence mine when it opens and ignore all other opportunities to collect essence). The best way to multiskill is by carrying a gem bag full with uncut gems (60 sapphires, emeralds, rubies and diamonds) into the minigame, taking them out of the gem sack, cutting them and depositing them at the Deposit Pool (which acts as a regular deposit box!) one inventory at a time. The point and xp rate will be lower than active GotR, but the crafting xp makes it more efficient. - An important strategy to increase your points per game (and per hour) at guardians of the rift is ‘empty cell running’. When out of essence, grab a cell from the table and enter an altar (higher tier is better) to charge the cell. Then deposit it for points, ideally on a golem but on a barrier is also fine. You can combine this with multiskilling for efficiency. - Make an amulet of glory when you have the crafting level (75+5) to make one.

steps.text: Do Corrupted Gauntlet for 6 armour seeds and one enhanced weapon seed (~70 hours) (tip: use longrange on staff hits for defence xp - alternatively you can use accurate for ~0.5% more accuracy, but we think the def xp is more valuable). Maintain hourlies as usual. You should be level 93 ranging after this step. On average, this will also give the following loot: - 2,960 crystal shards (it costs 2,300 shards to make a full set of crystal armour and a corrupted Bow of Faerdhinen - train smithing as necessary using GP from CG, see step 17 below - plus the armour needs charges). On droprate you will get another 580 shards (on top of the 2,800) from trading in excess armour and (regular) weapon seeds (into acorns, grown and chopped down for 14-16 shards each with ultracompost). - 51.5m gp profit in gp and assorted alchs (500 battlestaves for which you need to charge orbs, 500 diamonds that need crafting first) - it is recommended to make diamond and ruby bracelets but only cut (and then ignore) lower tier gems. - Making ruby bracelets has an effective gp/hr rate of 9m, which is low enough you can consider ignoring them. - 506k crafting xp from cutting and crafting gems and making air battlestaves. - 10,6k cosmic runes, 6.9k nature runes, 6.4k law runes, 13.8k chaos runes (sell these for tokkul for future onyxes to make zenytes), 7.5k death runes, 6.3k blood runes - 62.5k mithril arrows, 30.6k adamant arrows, 17.5k rune arrows, 3.8k dragon arrows - If you get 6 armour shards and an enhanced weapon seed way earlier, just leave and make up for the lack of gp and resources elsewhere. The Corrupted Gauntlet is only worth for the sake of grinding the Bow of Faerdhinen and its armour. - How to Farm the Corrupted Gauntlet | Lower your Average Time to 8 Minutes!shows a good guide on completing the Corrupted Gauntlet with t1 prep. It is recommended to immediately aim for t1 armour, rather than first learning t2 armour methods and then unlearning those bad habits when settling into the grind later. Important note: the food advice in this video guide is incorrect, the timing of eating does not matter (with some minor exceptions). It is highly recommended to safe up, i.e. eat every time your HP is 21 or more below your max health at Hunllef. See also OSRSRecklessLadHowDoesFoodWorkV2.png. - McClumpy CG Prep shows an easier approach to t1 prep including prescouting (it is highly recommended to prescout regardless of what else you choose to go for), sacrificing a bit of time per prep to gain lots of consistency. - Corrupted Gauntlet - prepping t1 shows a (lousy) example run by the author. - During the Hunllef fight focus on positioning > overheads > eating and drinking egniol > attacking > offensive prayers. In general you want to be near the middle of the room, so that Hunllef is standing between you and the edge of the room. This gives you maximum flexibility for moving around later.
