steps.text: Go to Guardians of the Rift, participate in the minigame until you have the full Raiments of the Eye and the colossal pouch. - Guardians of the Rift - multiskilling - this video shows a simple example of multiskill Guardians of the Rift - you still make combination runes, but focus on skilling rather than participating throughout most of the game (in fact, you only enter the west essence mine when it opens and ignore all other opportunities to collect essence). The best way to multiskill is by carrying a gem bag full with uncut gems (60 sapphires, emeralds, rubies and diamonds) into the minigame, taking them out of the gem sack, cutting them and depositing them at the Deposit Pool (which acts as a regular deposit box!) one inventory at a time. The point and xp rate will be lower than active GotR, but the crafting xp makes it more efficient. If you are out of/low on uncut gems, instead do: - Guardians of the Rift - mass world, 4 pouches, combination runes (the same method as before). - An important strategy to increase your points per game (and per hour) at guardians of the rift is ‘empty cell running’. When out of essence, grab a cell from the table and enter an altar (higher tier is better) to charge the cell. Then deposit it for points, ideally on a golem but on a barrier is also fine. You can combine this with multiskilling for efficiency. - At 65 runecrafting complete the Ardougne Hard diary (also requires a shield left half). - After completing the full outfit and the colossal pouch, consider going for full bloodbark to help with future slayer. It is the most convenient to obtain +1% magic damage gear.

steps.text: Do While Guthix Sleeps if you haven’t already. Start and complete Dragon Slayer II (using your Bow of Faerdhinen to deal with the strong bosses – protect from magic and antifire potions will, when combined, provide decent dragonfire protection except against metal dragons and Galvek where you need the shield plus a rune crossbow), putting Ellen’s XP at the end on Strength. Kill Vorkath up to 50 times to get an Ava’s Assembler. Complete Monkey Madness II (put Duke’s xp on Strength).

steps.text: Do Devious Minds, then Secrets of the North (a bowfa is pretty strong against, well, everything). Do Beneath Cursed Sands (did you know the bowfa works very well against these enemies) and Into the Tombs (don’t make me say it). The best use for the lamp is on strength. Optional but recommended: kill the Phantom Muspah(/Grumbler) for an ancient icon to upgrade your ancient staff (make some mithril sapphire bolts (e) and a rune crossbow for the smite phase). Start and complete Desert Treasure II, putting the xp on prayer. Collect a quest cape. - Your best weapons for the four bosses are: - Vardorvis: Arkan blade (this is going to be rough) - Duke Sucellus: Arclight - Leviathan: Bow of Faerdhinen - Whisperer: The strongest Earth spell you can cast (just don’t stand in the wave bro)

steps.text: Use the money from CG to train smithing to level 86 with UIM gold. You’ll need to buy around 42.3k gold ores to get 86 Smithing for all diaries. Smelt at least 15 runite bars. Convert your cut diamonds and rubies into bracelets (optionally also enchant them, this is technically only worth it if you find a way to ‘0time’ it though) and charge enough unpowered orbs to match your battlestaves, then alch those/cash those in (e.g. at artefacts). Optional: also include ruby bracelets. - Optional: you can also train to ‘just’ level 83, so you can +5 for the Lumbridge Elite diary. This takes approximately 29.9k gold ores, but also means you can’t complete sailing. - Optional: complete the Ardougne Elite Diary ‘make a rune crossbow from scratch’ step. If you have the rest of the stats, complete the Ardougne Elite diary, this requires doing NMZ for imbuing a salve amulet. - Optional but recommended: force spawn some marks of grace, bankstanding processing resources you have (e.g. herbs) to make staminas to help with smithing. Using super energy potions is also fine, and the dropping method of UIM gold doesn’t require any at all.

Using super energy potions is also fine, and the dropping method of UIM gold doesn’t require any at all.

steps.text: Boost to smith 3 runite bars into 45 rune nails (if you did not go to 86 smithing earlier this step is out of reach). Buy 4 magic stones at the Keldagrim stonemason. Build a crystal extractor on your sloop and on your skiff - make sure to put the skiff extractor next to the helm, but the sloop extractor on the port side next to your front facility hotspot. Boost to build an eternal brazier on your sloop and on your skiff. Boosting where necessary, chart the Northern ocean in full. This completes your charting, go to Chartin’ Charles McAtless to collect your XP bonuses and the Horizon’s lure - buy 50 of the drink and put it in a keg on both ships. If you did ship combat earlier you have the resources to build the gale catcher on your skiff, and the key ingredients (but not the level) to build a chum spreader and two cotton trawling nets for your sloop later. - Charting: follow this route in the Northern Ocean. First follow the pink route with a raft, then follow the red route with your skiff, both starting from RellekkaNorthern Ocean.png. Drink the bottle of fishier bladderier stout shortly after getting it (complete the meteorologist first), you will be teleported to the troll arena with your ship docked at Rellekka again (just teleport out and resume the route). At Buccanneer’s Haven collect the eternal brazier schematic and the small key for the dragon cannon schematic, to be collected at your leisure. - You can get the bottle of exile’s welcome (crate in Lunar port) on a skiff by reversing and getting the player tile as close as possible to the crate. This bottle will teleport you to a random lunar teleport. - The bottle of kgp standard issue martini will teleport you to the Rellekka Hunter area. - The bottle of the winter sun will teleport you to the sand dune near Pollnivneach and your boat to the Ruins of Unkah. - It is recommended to finish the last three potions in this order: - Drink the kgp standard issue martini, make your way back to Rellekka port - Drink the winter sun, dueling ring to Al Kharid and make your way to Unkah. - Drink the exile’s welcome last. - If, at this point, there are any charting tasks incomplete (and it’s not the meteorologists in Ardent, which you revisit at your own convenience) please inform us on discord. - The crystal extractor(s) will give you a significant amount of crystal shards while going for 99 sailing. They are always worth using during your sailing activities. - With 78 slayer you gain access to Aquanites, and with 80 slayer you gain access to Nechryaels. Both have interesting sailing locations (Aquanites on Ynysdail drop a lot of herb seeds, the Nechryaels on the Charred Isle drop herb seeds and can be barraged). - At this point you are still missing two schematics: the rosewood & cotton sails and the dragon keel. Collect these at your own convenience when you have the levels. - If you want the Sailor’s Amulet and haven’t gotten one yet, it is worth considering building rune salvaging hooks and salvaging for a bit. You can store the hooks in facility bottles after.
steps.itemsNeeded: yes

steps.text: Get a fire cape off task (if you don’t have one yet). - Note: there are many strategies for getting a fire cape. Some suggestions include: - Bring blood barrage to heal during the waves, carry your food to the Jad fight. - Bring vengeance and brews and deliberately tank a mage frog hit regularly to speed up the caves. - Bring thralls, recasting whenever you move to increase your dps (expensive but fast). - Bring spellbook swap, vengeance and thralls to combine 2+3. - You can find an example setup for the fight caves here. If you have divine ranged potions, use those.

steps.text: Get a dragon pickaxe (if you intend on going for at least partial completion of the Combat Achievements then just hop bosses while going for kc at each of them). If you plan on getting a Voidwaker later you will most likely get multiple dragon pickaxes along the way - the recommended bosses for that are Artio, Spindel and Vet’ion. Alternatively you may wish to postpone it for when you go for the Kq head, hoping to get one along the way. - This is a setup for fbow chaos elemental., this method is fast if you don’t care for the voidwaker.

steps.text: Cash your banked herblore XP, using MOGs force spawning at Ardy. Make some staminas for future use. - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IuqyCbHuxu8 (newest force spawning marks of grace example video). - Older sources: Force spawning marks of grace on Ardy rooftop and Force Spawning Marks of Grace [Explanation + Example] show the basics of force spawning marks of grace. However, we have since learned of the exact mechanics of spawning marks (https://oldschool.runescape.wiki/w/Mark_of_grace#Obtaining_marks_of_grace), allowing for the best possible method below. The method is stunningly simple: - Every 3 to 9.5 minutes (inclusive, lower is better but don’t be too quick), do exactly one lap at Ardougne rooftops, then do other activities at your leisure. A mark of grace will spawn upon finishing the lap (and you will pick it up on your next lap) 75% of the time. When you are done, do one more lap (so a back to back lap to finish off) to grab the potential final mark. If no mark spawned on a certain lap don’t panic, just keep to the rhythm. Using this strategy you get a mark of grace per 1057.3 xp on average at Ardougne, so that going from level 98 to 99 with this method gives approximately 1160 marks of grace or 2900 (4)-dose staminas (note: the real number is lower because of agility quest xp rewards collected after level 98).

actions.text: Cash your banked herblore XP, using MOGs force spawning at Ardy.
Make some staminas for future use..
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IuqyCbHuxu8 (newest force spawning marks of grace example video)..
Older sources: Force spawning marks of grace on Ardy rooftop and Force Spawning Marks of Grace [Explanation + Example] show the basics of force spawning marks of grace.
However, we have since learned of the exact mechanics of spawning marks (https://oldschool.runescape.wiki/w/Mark_of_grace#Obtaining_marks_of_grace), allowing for the best possible method below.
The method is stunningly simple:.
Every 3 to 9.5 minutes (inclusive, lower is better but don’t be too quick), do exactly one lap at Ardougne rooftops, then do other activities at your leisure.
A mark of grace will spawn upon finishing the lap (and you will pick it up on your next lap) 75% of the time.
When you are done, do one more lap (so a back to back lap to finish off) to grab the potential final mark.
If no mark spawned on a certain lap don’t panic, just keep to the rhythm.

Using this strategy you get a mark of grace per 1057.3 xp on average at Ardougne, so that going from level 98 to 99 with this method gives approximately 1160 marks of grace or 2900 (4)-dose staminas (note: the real number is lower because of agility quest xp rewards collected after level 98).

steps.text: Complete the remaining tasks for the Falador and Kandarin Elite diaries if you have the herblore level required (boostable 81 and 86 respectively).

steps.text: 3t4s mine 20k sand (for level 93 crafting) or 70k sand (for level 99 crafting), buying all the sand (buy bucket packs first to match the amount required) 3 tick sandstone mining at new spot (easier method). Super glassmake all the sand with previously farmed giant seaweed. If you aren’t 91 thieving yet, arteglass the molten glass until you are.

steps.text: Optional but recommended: now that you have daeyalt mining https://streamable.com/it7kry unlocked and the full raiments of the eye set, there is almost nothing holding you back from training runecrafting, e.g. with spellbook swap Vile Vigour fletching (multiskill) ZMI runecrafting (or non-spellbook swap stamina potions). It is macroefficient to complete level 90 or 95 runecrafting sooner rather than later, to have access to ample wrath runes for offering spells during slayer. Weave in the runecrafting grind at your own convenience, immediately is recommended. Blow glass while ZMI crafting, then when out of glass swap over to fletching instead (buy broad arrowhead packs and arrow shafts as needed). - It is meta to sell some of the runes you craft. Sell laws past the first 10,000 and nature runes past the first 30,000 (note: you may wish to keep more runes for your own purposes) to Ali Morissane. Optionally also sell chaos runes for tokkul to TzHaar-Mej-Roh, buying onyx bolt tips and uncut gems with the tokkul (this requires a fire cape). - You can multiskill barbarian mixes with ZMI by teleporting to a bank (sepulchre recommended) after crafting the runes, filling your inv with a 50/50 mix of caviar and 2-dose potions, teleporting to Ourania, then making them as you run to the ladder. Then bank again at Eniola to grab the essence and fletching/crafting materials for your next inventory of ZMI.

with spellbook swap Vile Vigour fletching (multiskill) ZMI runecrafting (or non-spellbook swap stamina potions).
It is macroefficient to complete level 90 or 95 runecrafting sooner rather than later, to have access to ample wrath runes for offering spells during slayer.
Weave in the runecrafting grind at your own convenience, immediately is recommended.
Blow glass while ZMI crafting, then when out of glass swap over to fletching instead (buy broad arrowhead packs and arrow shafts as needed)..
It is meta to sell some of the runes you craft.
Sell laws past the first 10,000 and nature runes past the first 30,000 (note: you may wish to keep more runes for your own purposes) to Ali Morissane.
Optionally also sell chaos runes for tokkul to TzHaar-Mej-Roh, buying onyx bolt tips and uncut gems with the tokkul (this requires a fire cape)..

You can multiskill barbarian mixes with ZMI by teleporting to a bank (sepulchre recommended) after crafting the runes, filling your inv with a 50/50 mix of caviar and 2-dose potions, teleporting to Ourania, then making them as you run to the ladder.
Then bank again at Eniola to grab the essence and fletching/crafting materials for your next inventory of ZMI.

steps.text: If you only went for one sceptre earlier, do Pyramid Plunder for a second sceptre. Compared to last time the only things that changed are: - Use the teleport on your sceptre instead of entering the pyramid. You no longer need to hop for a North mummy. There is/was a bug where you have to leave the previous run instead of teleport out to avoid broken timers. - The rooms change little: - Room 7: loot the urns as you encounter them (south to north, then along the south wall around the chest). Open the doors clockwise starting east. If you're level 91 or above, make sure to go for chest when the timer hits around 2:10. - Room 8: grab the east urns first, then trace back south and go clockwise. Grab the chest before or after the last urn and exit through the northeast open door. - The most important trick to getting high xp and sceptre rates is not using the full 5 minutes per pp game - most of the time you should be getting laps of 4:40 or faster while opening all 81+ urns (and skipping urns in the second to last room if you can’t keep this pace). This also means you'll run out of synch with other people playing PP, so while you can make use of information from doors others have opened for you (and skip them) while in the same room it's not going to be huge most of the time. - Still open chests starting at level 51 room.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd

steps.text: Once you have enough mahogany planks from Misc (or chop teaks at your own convenience), train construction to level 83 with mahogany benches (or tables, slightly lower xp but also lower effort). This takes approximately 10.5k mahogany logs (47 days of Misc at 10 workers). Once done, build/upgrade the following: - Ornate rejuvenation pool (requires boostable 87 herblore, along with some Zulrah kills for the scales and antidote++) - Ornate jewellery box (if you have the dragonstones) - Gilded magic wardrobe (optional) - Fairy ring (purchase a second superior garden) - Marble cape rack - Occult altar - Mahogany treasure chest - The total item requirements for this are: 1 Pharaoh’s sceptre, 10000 astral runes, Ancient signet, Lunar signet, 5 limestone bricks, 5 buckets of water, 1000 soul runes, 1000 body runes, 10 stamina potions(4), 10 prayer potions(4), 3 marble blocks, 10 super restores(4), 9 gold leaves, 10 anti-venom(4), 1000 blood runes, 10 mushrooms, 1 Fairy enchantment, 4 mahogany planks, 5 combat bracelets(4), 5 skills necklaces(4), 8 Amulets of glory(4) and 8 Rings of wealth(5). - Note: this list assumes you didn’t have any pool previously built.
steps.itemsNeeded: tbd
